backlog.title: Bootstrap harness starter
backlog.summary: Established the starter topology, durable state files, and archive pattern used by later work.

backlog.title: Dark mode context provider and polished toggle
backlog.summary: The sprint remains the single runnable active sprint after a failed adversarial review. State-update already reconciled the failure, and FEAT-001 is queued for explicit compounding before the clean retry resumes.
backlog.next_action: Run compound-capture for FEAT-001, then restore FEAT-001 from clean_restore_ref, dispatch generator-execution attempt 02, rerun build/startup triage, and only then return to adversarial-live-review if the retry remains within budget.
